channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Katseye Talks About Performing “Pinky Up” For the First Time At Coachella & “Golden” With HUNTR/X | Billboard News
item.description:
[Energetic music fades out, and the host's voice takes over]
Host: Welcome to "Trending Now", the podcast where we dive into the latest updates from the music world. I'm your host, and today we're talking about the hottest performance from Coachella 2026 weekend 1. KATSEYE just took the stage, and we've got the scoop.
[Short music transition]
Host: The group performed their brand new song, "Pinky Up", and we can't get enough of it. But what's really interesting is how they feel about the choreography. According to KATSEYE, the moves for "Pinky Up" stand out from some of their other songs. We're curious to see how fans react to the new routine.
[Short music transition]
Host: But that's not all - KATSEYE also performed "Golden" from the Netflix series 'KPop Demon Hunters' alongside HUNTR/X. The collaboration was a highlight of the weekend, and we're loving the energy. It's clear that KATSEYE is on top of their game, and we can't wait to see what's next for this talented group.
[Outro music starts playing]
Host: That's all for today, folks. Thanks for tuning in to "Trending Now". If you missed KATSEYE's performance at Coachella, be sure to check it out online. And don't forget to follow us for more updates from the world of music.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
